final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing editorial illustration of a Douyin (TikTok) live-stream screenshot featuring a young woman resembling a celestial-beauty idol, holding a sign, designed for a 9:16 mobile screen.

Style/medium: photorealistic live-stream screenshot UI, Douyin app interface with overlaid viewer comments and like animations, warm studio lighting feel
Composition: vertical 9:16 portrait, the host centered in frame, sign held up clearly in front of her, Douyin live-stream UI chrome (comment feed, viewer count, gift animations) framing the edges
Subject: a graceful young woman with delicate features and long dark hair, dressed in soft elegant attire, holding a rectangular sign with both hands facing the camera
Scene/backdrop: clean indoor live-stream setup, soft warm background with subtle ring-light reflection in her eyes
Lighting/mood: warm, flattering ring-light glow — the intimate brightness of a late-night live room, welcoming and luminous
Color palette: warm skin tones against a soft neutral backdrop, Douyin red-and-white UI accents, gentle pink-gold ambient warmth
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 今晚直播，欢迎来参亦菲畅聊！
Constraints: sign text must be fully legible and centered on the sign; Douyin live-stream UI elements (comment bar, heart/like floats, viewer count) visible around the frame; 9:16 vertical orientation
Avoid: blurry or distorted text on the sign, generic stock-photo look, dark or moody lighting, any real celebrity likeness
